base_metr_la_protocol.transfer_policy: Optimization, loss weighting, checkpoint criterion, and four-stage robust-failure curriculum are inherited without PEMS-BAY hyperparameter tuning.

determinism.seed_policy: Each final model seed initializes Python, NumPy, PyTorch, and CUDA random generators with its own declared seed.

reproducibility_policy.cuda_policy: Set CUBLAS_WORKSPACE_CONFIG before importing PyTorch, enable deterministic algorithms, disable cuDNN benchmark, and use deterministic cuDNN execution.
reproducibility_policy.immutable_checkpoint_policy: Checkpoint and history paths are unique by model seed and cannot be overwritten.
reproducibility_policy.python_numpy_torch_seed_policy: Set each model seed before model initialization, data-loader construction, and optimizer initialization.

selection_policy.checkpoint_criterion: Minimum fixed selection composite overall MAE.

selection_protocol.mask_randomisation: Fixed deterministic corruption seed derived only from split_name, target_start, scenario_identifier, and model_seed. Epoch number is excluded.
selection_protocol.selection_criterion: Global raw-speed MAE aggregated across all valid future targets from the three fixed selection scenarios.
selection_protocol.target_policy: Artificial corruption applies only to historical native-observed entries. Future target masks and values remain unchanged.

supersedes.reason: Protocol v1 changed selection corruption masks across epochs because epoch_number was included in selection-mask randomisation. Protocol v2 fixes selection masks for every selection target start and scenario across all epochs.

test_policy.scenario_evaluation: All nine frozen controlled-dropout scenarios are evaluated after model selection.

training_corruption_policy.calibration_policy: Calibration target windows are inaccessible during training and model selection.
training_corruption_policy.mask_generation: Dynamic deterministic corruption generated per epoch and target window according to the inherited four-stage robust-failure curriculum.
training_corruption_policy.target_policy: Future targets and future target masks remain native.
training_corruption_policy.test_policy: Primary-test target windows are inaccessible during training and model selection.

training_protocol_note: Training corruption remains epoch-dependent to implement the failure curriculum. Selection corruption is strictly fixed across epochs.

window_contract.target_policy: Native future targets are retained. Artificial corruption is applied only to historical native-observed entries.
